summary: Iteration 84: Backend tests for arch field and tooth-specific bone info logic - ALL 14 TESTS PASSED. Verified: (1) POST /api/procedures with arch='Maxillary'/'Mandibular' for Full Arch procedures, (2) POST without arch for Single Implant, (3) GET returns arch field, (4) Smart Planner dynamic labels for Maxillary/Mandibular arch, (5) Material compatibility returns 5 prosthesis types, (6) Frontend code verification for tooth-specific bone info logic in both implant-selection.tsx and CaseImplantPlanning.tsx.
critical_code_review_comments: Frontend code correctly implements tooth-specific bone info logic with useMemo hooks
BoneInputs component in implant-selection.tsx accepts 'tooth' prop and is called with tooth={cTooth} (Let Me Choose) and tooth={sTooth} (Suggest Me)
CaseImplantPlanning.tsx has boneWidthInfo/boneHeightInfo useMemo hooks with correct tooth-specific rules
Info text correctly disappears when input is focused (widthFocused/heightFocused state)
All 4 tooth regions covered: Anterior maxillary (11-13, 21-23), Posterior maxillary (14-17, 24-27), Anterior mandibular (31-33, 41-43), Posterior mandibular (34-37, 44-47)
seed_data_creation: Test procedures created and cleaned up during tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 84 verified the tooth-specific bone info feature. The frontend is React Native (Expo) so cannot be browser-tested. Backend API tests use MongoDB direct updates to advance procedure status to 'completed' for Smart Planner testing. All arch field and Smart Planner tests pass.
